item.title: Version 2.1.13
item.description:
Release Notes for Version 2.1.13

What's New

Version 2.1.9 — Enhanced Browsing & Window Stability

  • 🌐 Browser Popup Support: Enjoy a more complete browsing experience with new support for popups and "target=_blank" links, opening seamlessly in new tabs.
  • 📺 Fullscreen Protection: Improved stability by automatically disabling accessory mode transitions while in fullscreen mode to prevent UI layout issues.
  • 🪟 Refined Window Management: Enhanced window snapping and collapsing functionality when outside of accessory mode for a smoother desktop experience.
  • 🛠️ UI Reliability: Fixed window miniaturization behavior in accessory mode to ensure a consistent and predictable interface.
